raw_extraction.innovation: Introduces **Mixture-of-Denoisers (MoD)**, a unified pre-training objective combining multiple denoising paradigms (span corruption, sequential denoising, extreme denoising) to achieve universal effectiveness across tasks. Also proposes **mode-switching** for dynamic adaptation between pre-training schemes during fine-tuning
raw_extraction.application: General-purpose language understanding/generation, zero-shot/in-context learning, structured knowledge grounding, commonsense reasoning, long-document summarization, instruction tuning
raw_extraction.research_problem: Designing universally effective pre-trained language models across diverse datasets and tasks without task-specific trade-offs
raw_extraction.pretraining_task: Mixture-of-Denoisers (MoD) including X-denoising, S-denoising, R-denoising, and custom objectives
